title: A-05 Validation pass — machine-checkable evidence against the canonical spec

steps.title: Prompt (send verbatim to the agent)
steps.body:
Run the final validation pass for the Hexa Sort implementation against the canonical spec.

Check and record each as PASS/FAIL with short evidence:
1) Compile status — zero compile errors.
2) Required scene objects exist — BoardRoot, SlotsRoot, PiecesRoot, GameManager.
3) Reference solution — replay the four moves from canonical-spec.md §7 from LoadSeed() and record whether IsSolved becomes true and SolvedFiredCount equals 1. Prefer an EditMode test; if you run it, include the pass/fail.
4) Negative cases — confirm each case in §7 returns the expected MoveResult (SameSlot, EmptySource, ColorMismatch, DestFull).
5) Solved predicate on partial boards — confirm SolvedFiredCount stays 0 on the seed and after each non-final move.

Write Assets/_Benchmark/Run/A-05-validation.md in this format:
- Check name | Result (PASS/FAIL) | Evidence (short) | Follow-up action if FAIL.

steps.title: Expected outcomes (done_when — verify each with the named tool)
items: unity_open_mcp_scene_get_data confirms the required root objects still exist (BoardRoot, SlotsRoot, PiecesRoot, GameManager)
The reference solution from canonical-spec.md §7 replays to IsSolved == true and SolvedFiredCount == 1 (run as an EditMode test if one was written; otherwise a documented deterministic replay)
The negative cases from §7 return the expected non-Ok MoveResult (Move(0,0)→SameSlot, Move(3,0) on seed→EmptySource, Move(0,1) on seed→ColorMismatch, overflow→DestFull)
SolvedFiredCount stays 0 on the seed and after each non-final move
Assets/_Benchmark/Run/A-05-validation.md records each check with PASS/FAIL + evidence

steps.title: Paste the agent output / A-05-validation.md contents

reset.note: The agent authors A-05-validation.md under Assets/_Benchmark/Run/, which the suite has no manifest for. To reset before another run: delete Assets/_Benchmark/HexaSort/ and Assets/_Benchmark/Run/, delete any Hexa Sort scene, then confirm editor idle (editor_status not compiling, not in play mode; read_compile_errors zero).
